name: Retro announced next financing round and first-in-human progress
summary: Retro Biosciences announced the initial close of a new financing round while describing first-in-human and manufacturing progress for its aging biology pipeline.
significance_note: Shows material financing and clinical-transition infrastructure for an aging-biology company. Clinical claims remain activity context unless registry or study records are separately reviewed.

surface_routing.rationale: The financing and first-in-human language are field activity and trial-horizon context, but clinical details should stay out of evidence surfaces until registry or study records are reviewed.
